product_information.product_name: Umberto Giannini Curl Jelly Scrunching Jelly 50 ML
product_information.description:
Umberto Giannini Curl Jelly Scrunching Jelly 50 ml is al meer dan 20 jaar de curly girl favourite! Verdrijft pluis, voegt glans toe en geeft sublieme definitie aan golven en krullen. De magische anti-frizz Curl Jelly-formule kan alle soorten krullen temmen en in de gewenste vorm brengen. Deze scrunching jelly is een lichtgewicht met medium hold en met ongelooflijke slip door het haar. Veilig voor gekleurd, chemisch behandeld, ontspannen haar en hairextensions. Perfect voor golvende, krullende en kroezige haartexturen.
Optimaal gebruik
Step 1:
Massage
Curl Jelly Wash 250ml
thoroughly through wet hair, cleansing your hair and scalp to remove product build-up.
Step 2:
Smooth
Curl Jelly Care 250ml
through damp hair to de-tangle and nourish.
Step 3:
Use
Curl Jelly Shine 180ml
as step 1 in your styling routine. Smooth through towel dried hair and follow up with your other UG styling products, diffuse or air dry as usual.
Step 4:
Apply
Curl Scrunching Jelly 200ml
through mid-lengths and ends scrunching upwards to create bouncy defined curls. Scrunch dry with a diffuser or leave to air dry.
Step 5:
Smooth enough
No More Frizz 75ml
serum through your mid lengths and ends to evenly coat them in a silky smooth veil of shine and nourishment. Less if you’re mildly frizzy or just need some split ends hiding, more for thick, unruly hair.
Refresh:
Need a refresh between washes? Spray
Curl Jelly Refresh 150ml
evenly over dry hair. Scrunch through curls and style as usual.
